{{Quote|He calls himself Yeep. I don't know if that's his name, his species, or the word for his chest.|Tuner Ryna|<ref name="HoloNet News" />}}
'''Yeep''' was a [[Teek/Legends|Teek]] who found his way onto the [[Tuner Ryna's starship|starship]] of [[Spacer/Legends|space-farer]] [[Tuner Ryna]] by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Although unsure if "Yeep" was in fact the stowaway's name, Ryna entered him in the [[Standard year/Legends|annual]] "[[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]]" event on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]]. Yeep easily won the competition's [[Limb/Legends|biped]] race and was afterward declared [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] enough to keep his first-place medal, which he attempted to [[Diet/Legends|eat]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The prestigious biped title was awarded under protest to a late entrant of unknown origins. Space-farer Tuner Ryna entered the furry being with pointy ears who 'just showed up one day' aboard his ship.|A HoloNet News report on the "Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings" event of 22 BBY|<ref name="HoloNet News" />}}
[[File:Yopaxtul.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Yopaxtul stood next to Yeep while the latter attempted to eat a medal.]]
A [[Teek/Legends|Teek]] known as Yeep lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="HoloNet News" /> By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="22 BBY">According to {{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|sports/13418_1.html|New Galaxy's Fastest Hexaped}}, it was reported Yeep had stowed away and won the biped race on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:4:18, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> he showed up aboard [[Spacer/Legends|space-farer]] [[Tuner Ryna]]'s [[Tuner Ryna's starship|starship]]. Yeep was able to communicate his name to Ryna, but the [[Realspace/Legends|space]]-farer was not entirely certain what "Yeep" meant and considered the possibility that it referred to the stowaway's [[Species/Legends|species]] or that it was a word for his chest.<ref name="HoloNet News" />

In that year, Ryna brought Yeep to the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pyre Folas]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]] and entered him in the annual "[[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]]" event. Yeep was a late entrant in the competition's [[Limb/Legends|biped]] race, which he easily won by putting on a burst of speed and outdistancing all of his opponents. This included the [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] [[Pumav]], who came seventh in that race behind Yeep despite winning the quadruped category. As Yeep was a being of "unknown origins," his victory was protested, but the event's judges declared him "adequately [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]]" and awarded him the prestigious biped title, which came with a medal.<ref name="HoloNet News" />

After receiving the award, Yeep attempted to [[Diet/Legends|eat]] the medal while being [[Camera/Legends|photographed]] by [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] alongside Pumav and the [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] [[Yopaxtul]]. On the date 13:4:18, the photo was used in the "[[Sports]]" section of an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the HoloNet News, which reported on both how Ryna and Yeep met and the outcome of the sporting event.<ref name="HoloNet News" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|The judges deemed Yeep to be 'adequately sentient' after easily out-distancing the field with a flash of speed.|A HoloNet News report on the "Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings" event of 22 BBY|<ref name="HoloNet News" />}}
Yeep had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], sand-colored skin, and a coat of [[Hair/Legends|fur]] made up of white and grey hair. He had difficulty communicating with Tuner Ryna and was a creature mysterious enough to the judges and spectators of "Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings" to have his sentience called into question.<ref name="HoloNet News" /> Like other members of his species,<ref name="The Battle for Endor">''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''</ref> Yeep could run at a considerably fast speed. After winning the Mobquet race, he placed his medal inside his [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]], despite it being neither edible nor [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] to be consumed.<ref name="HoloNet News" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yeep appeared in the online article "New Galaxy's Fastest Hexaped," published<ref name="HoloNet News" /> on [[April 18]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN52 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #52'']], an installment of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]].<ref name="HoloNet News" /> It was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] and illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]].<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
